title: common: fix getFormat func
body:
Modify the authentication method of format.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: @q384566678, thanks for the fix! Would you rephrase the commit message and describe that is fixing a bug? The commit title could be something like `common: getFormat: match entire string not only the prefix`. It's really helpful for packagers who are reading the changelog to know what has been changed.
The CI hiccup looks similar to the ones we had in libpod this week. I will try to wrap up a fix in another PR.
Once https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1090 is merged, you can rebase the PR and we can merge it.
LGTM assuming happy test. @q384566678 I think you can rebase at this point and tests will be happy.
@q384566678 can you try rebasing and repushing this one?
@q384566678 One more rebase for this one please?

The test are failing as we've some tests that use a format of "dockerv2".  @nalind is it OK to change those test to pass just "docker" or do we need to be able to support a format of "docker", "dockerv1" and "dockerv2"?  Our documentation just has "docker" with no reference to the versions.

:pushpin: Commit 63aba19 has been approved by `rhatdan`
